Goal: The E7 building featuring large glass windows and silver panels
Instruction: Walk straight along the paved path, keeping the red and yellow painted area to your left. Continue straight past the trees and cross the yellow and black striped crosswalk. Proceed straight across the wide paved plaza, keeping the tall grey building with the large dark banner on your left. Head towards the large building complex ahead and to your right. Stop when you reach the large building featuring large glass windows and silver panels. This is your destination.
